name: server
description: Express and SQLite backend for CampusFind.

scripts.test:db: node -e "const { initializeDatabase } = require('./database/schema'); const { testConnection, closeDatabase } = require('./db'); (async () => { await initializeDatabase(); const ok = await testConnection(); console.log(ok ? 'Database connection test passed.' : 'Database connection test failed.'); await closeDatabase(); process.exit(ok ? 0 : 1); })().catch(async (error) => { console.error(error); try { await closeDatabase(); } catch (_) {} process.exit(1); });"
